title: onopordum acaulon var. pyrenaicum
intro: Onopordum acaulon var. pyrenaicum, also known as Pyrenean cotton thistle, is a plant species in the sunflower family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been used to treat digestive problems, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and immune function.
